features: ENRICHED WITH FLORAL FUSION OIL & JASMINE—Each LUX Velvet Touch Beauty Soap Bar features a luxurious blend of floral fusion oil and the timeless scent of jasmine. This unique combination softens and soothes the face, hands, and body, leaving them beautifully smooth after every wash.

SOFT, FRAGRANT SKIN ALL DAY—Infused with the gentle fragrance of Jasmine, this beauty soap delicately scented your skin, letting you enjoy a lasting floral freshness throughout the day. It is ideal for men and women seeking a touch of indulgence in their daily routine.

INDULGENT LATHER FOR A SENSORIAL EXPERIENCE – Delight in a creamy, rich lather that combines Floral Fusion Oil for a spa-like feel at home. The luxurious lather glides across the skin, enveloping you in a soft fragrance bloom, perfect for the face and body.

LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS – This beauty soap bar is designed to refresh your skin and senses and offers gentle, all-day hydration and fragrance. Floral Fusion Oil with Jasmine elevates your bathing routine, keeping you feeling revitalized and refreshed after each shower.

LUXURIOUS DAILY CLEANSING – Enjoy an indulgent beauty bar that cleanses and nourishes skin, creating a velvet-soft feel. The LUX Velvet Touch Beauty Soap Bar enhances any skincare routine with a fresh, floral touch, perfect for daily pampering or as a thoughtful gift.
